title: Report on DESNZ’s proposed Contracts for Difference for Renewables Allocation Round 7 scheme
body: "The SAU has published its report providing advice to DESNZ concerning the proposed CfD AR7 scheme.  The report includes the SAU’s evaluation of DESNZ’s assessment of compliance of its proposed scheme with the requirements set out in the Subsidy Control Act 2022.  For more information visit the Referral of the proposed Contracts for Difference Allocation Round 7 scheme by the Department for Energy Security and Net Zero - GOV.UK "
